title: capsicum indicum var. luteum
intro: Capsicum indicum var. luteum, also known as yellow turmeric or yellow mustard plant, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of compounds like curcumin and allyl isothiocyanate. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Capsicum indicum var. luteum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be added to food as a spice to enhance its flavor and medicinal properties.
